case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. TIMOTHY DUGAN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-17-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT DUGAN, TIMOTHY DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-24-2013
NON SERVICE RE: SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-17-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
